title: ctenium concinnum
intro: Ctenium concinnum, also known as the 'Red-stemmed Ctenium', is a type of grass native to the tropical regions of Central and South America. This plant has been traditionally used in folk medicine for its medicinal properties, particularly its ability to treat respiratory issues such as bronchitis and asthma due to its expectorant properties. The health benefits of Ctenium concinnum include reducing inflammation, relieving coughs, and easing congestion, making it a popular remedy for respiratory conditions. Ctenium concinnum can be prepared as a herbal tea or infusion by steeping the leaves and stems in hot water, which is then consumed to reap its medicinal benefits.
